calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Aug-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Tomas Augustus DeLuco (Petitioner) appearing in person in pro per. Maria DeLuco (Interested Party) also appearing in person.

The Court inquired about there being issues using the Russian birth certificate. Tomas DeLuco stated that they were having problems with the Department of Motor Vehicles (DMV). The Court addressed the U.S. passport. Maria DeLuco stated that they will not let them use the passport, that they have been pleading with DMV for a month, and that Tomas needs to get a California driver's license. At the conclusion of comments, the Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Birth (order signed).

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Probate Examiner: Probate Director Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Matter not reported.
